title: selinum broteroi
intro: Selinum broteroi, also known as Wild Celery, is a biennial or perennial plant belonging to the carrot family (Apiaceae). The medicinal properties of Selinum broteroi lie in its roots and leaves, which contain compounds like apigenin, isorhapontigenin, and other essential oils that exhibit anti-inflammatory, antispasmodic, and expectorant properties. The health benefits of consuming Wild Celery include relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and coughs, as well as alleviating digestive problems, including bloating and cramps. Traditionally, the herb is prepared through infusions, teas, and tinctures, which can be consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
